tasks.subject: Task 1: AIBox stand-up of llamacpp-vision (operator-deploy)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A reachable OpenAI-compatible VLM endpoint at http://aibox:11437/v1/chat/completions serving Qwen2.5-VL-3B.

**Files:** None in repo (operator-side NSSM service).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- NSSM service llamacpp-vision is Running
- :11437/v1/models returns 200 with the model id
- Multimodal POST returns a non-empty description
- Shadow :11438 verified before promoting to :11437

**Verify:** Live shadow probe with a known JPEG fixture; promote to :11437 only after pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "curl -sf http://aibox:11437/v1/models", "acceptanceCriteria": ["NSSM service running", "/v1/models returns 200", "Multimodal probe returns non-empty description", "Shadow verified before promote"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: glados/vision/client.py — VLM HTTP client
tasks.description:
**Goal:** describe_images(images, prompt) -> str POSTs OpenAI-multimodal to llm_vision slot and returns description text.

**Files:**
- Create: glados/vision/client.py
- Test: tests/vision/test_client.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- describe_images([jpeg], prompt) returns choices[0].message.content
- Multi-image POSTs N image_url parts + 1 text part in order
- Authorization Bearer header passes through when api_key set
- Non-200 raises VisionClientError with status + body
- Timeout raises VisionClientError with URL

**Verify:** pytest tests/vision/test_client.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/vision/client.py", "tests/vision/test_client.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/vision/test_client.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["happy path returns text", "multi-image preserves order", "api_key passed in Authorization", "non-200 raises", "timeout raises", "empty list raises ValueError"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: glados/cameras/discovery.py — HA camera discovery cache
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 60-second-TTL cache of HA camera.* entities with friendly-name resolution.

**Files:**
- Create: glados/cameras/__init__.py, glados/cameras/discovery.py
- Test: tests/cameras/test_discovery.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- list_cameras() returns [(entity_id, friendly_name)] from /api/states
- Repeated calls within 60s use cache
- After TTL refreshes
- resolve_camera_name fuzzy-matches friendly_name + entity_id
- HA non-200 raises CameraDiscoveryError

**Verify:** pytest tests/cameras/test_discovery.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/cameras/__init__.py", "glados/cameras/discovery.py", "tests/cameras/__init__.py", "tests/cameras/test_discovery.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/cameras/test_discovery.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["filters to camera domain", "caches within TTL", "refreshes after TTL", "resolves friendly + entity_id", "non-200 raises"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: glados/cameras/snapshot.py — HA snapshot fetch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** fetch_snapshot(entity_id) -> bytes via HA /api/camera_proxy/<id>.

**Files:**
- Create: glados/cameras/snapshot.py
- Test: tests/cameras/test_snapshot.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 200 with image/* content-type returns bytes
- Non-200 raises with status + entity_id
- Non-image content-type raises
- Timeout raises with URL

**Verify:** pytest tests/cameras/test_snapshot.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/cameras/snapshot.py", "tests/cameras/test_snapshot.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/cameras/test_snapshot.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["200 returns bytes", "non-200 raises", "non-image rejected", "timeout surfaces URL"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: look_at_camera built-in tool
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Register OpenAI tool definition + dispatch in glados/core/builtin_tools.py. Returns {description} text only; image bytes flow out-of-band.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/core/builtin_tools.py
- Test: tests/core/test_builtin_tools_look_at_camera.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- is_image_yielding_tool predicate works
- invoke_image_yielding_tool returns (json_str, ImageEmission)
- Camera miss returns {error} + None emission
- Snapshot/VLM fail returns {error} + None
- Tool defn appears in get_builtin_tool_definitions()
- No regressions in existing builtin tests

**Verify:** pytest tests/core/test_builtin_tools_look_at_camera.py tests/core/ -k builtin -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/core/builtin_tools.py", "tests/core/test_builtin_tools_look_at_camera.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/core/test_builtin_tools_look_at_camera.py tests/core/ -k builtin -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["predicate matches only look_at_camera", "definition in builtin list", "happy path returns description + image", "camera miss → error no emission", "snapshot fail → error no emission", "vlm fail → error no emission"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: SSE event:image emission in _stream_chat_sse_impl
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When chat LLM calls look_at_camera, write event:image SSE chunk before appending tool result to LLM history. Chunk carries {tool_call_id, image_url}.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/core/api_wrapper.py (lines 2902-2944)
- Test: tests/core/test_api_wrapper_chat_image_sse.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- look_at_camera emits exactly one event:image frame with data URL
- Non-image-yielding tools emit no event:image
- {role:tool} history contains only {description} JSON, never bytes
- Errors from look_at_camera produce no event:image frame

**Verify:** pytest tests/core/test_api_wrapper_chat_image_sse.py tests/core/ -k chat -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/core/api_wrapper.py", "tests/core/test_api_wrapper_chat_image_sse.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/core/test_api_wrapper_chat_image_sse.py tests/core/ -k chat -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["event:image frame emitted on success", "data URL not in LLM history", "non-image tools emit nothing", "errors emit nothing"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: WebUI render event:image chunks inline
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Chat SSE consumer adds event:image branch; appends img.chat-inline-image to in-progress assistant bubble keyed by tool_call_id.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/static/ui.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- event:image chunk renders one inline thumbnail in assistant bubble
- Multiple tool_call_ids in one turn render multiple images
- Duplicate tool_call_id renders only once
- Malformed chunks ignored gracefully
- Page reload does NOT re-render the inline image

**Verify:** Hand-test in browser after deploy.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/static/ui.js"], "verifyCommand": "manual browser hand-test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["chunk renders inline thumbnail", "multiple chunks render multiple", "duplicate id idempotent", "malformed ignored", "reload drops inline image"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: WebUI inline-image styles
tasks.description:
**Goal:** .chat-inline-image renders at 320x240 max with rounded corners and GLaDOS-orange border.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/static/ui.css

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- max-width 320, max-height 240
- 6px border-radius, 8px vertical margin
- Plays well with both bubble backgrounds

**Verify:** Hand-check after Task 7.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/static/ui.css"], "verifyCommand": "manual visual check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["size limit honored", "border-radius + margin", "background-compatible"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Cleanup of dead vision-queue code
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove lazy-stub VisionProcessor, in-process VisionRequest/State/Config queue path, vision_look legacy tool, and rewire call sites.

**Files:**
- Delete: glados/tools/vision_look.py, glados/vision/vision_request.py, glados/vision/vision_state.py, glados/vision/vision_config.py
- Rewrite: glados/vision/__init__.py
- Modify: glados/tools/__init__.py, glados/core/engine.py, glados/core/llm_processor.py, glados/autonomy/loop.py, glados/vision/constants.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Zero references to VisionProcessor/Request/State/Config + vision_look in glados/
- python -c 'import glados.vision' clean
- pytest -q passes (no test count regression)

**Verify:** pytest -q && python -c 'import glados.vision; import glados.engine'

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/tools/vision_look.py", "glados/vision/vision_request.py", "glados/vision/vision_state.py", "glados/vision/vision_config.py", "glados/vision/__init__.py", "glados/tools/__init__.py", "glados/core/engine.py", "glados/core/llm_processor.py", "glados/autonomy/loop.py", "glados/vision/constants.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zero dead-symbol references", "vision import clean", "full suite passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Live-probe smoke + slice closeout
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm deployed container handles a real chat turn against live :11437 + real HA camera.

**Files:** None (verification only).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- /health 200 on 8015 + 8052
- 'What do you see in the back yard?' returns text + inline image
- Container logs show look_at_camera with image-yielding builtin path
- Negative test: nonexistent camera returns graceful error with available list
- No tracebacks from cameras/discovery, snapshot, or vision/client

**Verify:** Operator-witnessed.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "manual live-probe in WebUI chat", "acceptanceCriteria": ["deploy healthy", "happy-path chat works", "negative test graceful", "no tracebacks"]}
```
